name: teamwork-task
description: Fetch Teamwork.com tasklist/task by URL, implement each task in the current repo, commit per task using TYPE(scope): Message convention, and log time back to Teamwork. Pulls task attachments and comments, auto-moves the task across the board (In progress → Internal testing), gates risky commits for review, and writes sequential time logs that pick up where your last Teamwork timelog ended.
